overallScores.notes: Cycle 1 fixes improved app health significantly (4 bugs fixed, 0 regressions, pass rate 63%→97.6%). However, learner testing revealed 3 new critical blockers: (1) SpaceViewerPage React hooks violation, (2) student not enrolled in LLD/Behavioral classes, (3) learner test scripts used wrong URL pattern /story/ instead of /story-points/. Content quality unverifiable for 3 of 4 spaces due to access issues.

stillBroken.feature: Level badge and XP progress bar

featureAudit.notes: Pass rate improvement driven by Cycle 1 bug fixes. LLD and Behavioral spaces entirely inaccessible due to enrollment + URL issues — test results from those learners are unreliable.

consolidatedIssues.title: SpaceViewerPage React hooks violation: useState after conditional early-returns

rootCause.explanation: Line 103: `const [celebrationShown, setCelebrationShown] = useState(false)` is placed AFTER conditional early-returns at lines 63-98 (loading skeleton, error state, and 'not found' state). This violates React Rules of Hooks — hooks must be called in the same order every render, never conditionally. When the component early-returns before reaching line 103, React sees different hook counts between renders, causing a crash caught by ErrorBoundary.

fixSpecification.action: Move useState to before early returns
steps: Move `const [celebrationShown, setCelebrationShown] = useState(false)` from line 103 to line 45 (after the existing useState-like useMemo at line 47, or near other state declarations)
All other code stays the same — only the position of this one hook changes
Also move `const overallPercentage`, `const pointsEarned`, `const totalPoints` (lines 100-102) above the early returns since they depend on data that might not exist yet — use optional chaining
fixSpecification.verifyWith: Navigate to /spaces/{any-space-id} — should render h1 and story point list without crash

consolidatedIssues.title: Student not enrolled in LLD class — all LLD content returns 404

rootCause.explanation: Test student (student.test@subhang.academy, entity: vmP1QTDZBRCqE3Mr6IPK) is only enrolled in System Design (PDFq1OluyAGNAz6Fpx0j) and DSA (ZikR8xEHkqIaIsugmdQg) spaces via class cls_g10_sysdesign_a. The student is NOT assigned to class cls_g10_lld_a, so the LLD space (XTw3bLqiT4dMyvFJkI0g) is not accessible.

fixSpecification.action: Enroll test student in LLD class
steps: Option A: Update seed config to add student entity vmP1QTDZBRCqE3Mr6IPK to class cls_g10_lld_a
Option B: Use Firebase Admin to add student to LLD class enrollment
Verify: After enrollment, /spaces page should show 'Low-Level Design & OOP' space card
Verify: /spaces/XTw3bLqiT4dMyvFJkI0g should render with story points visible
fixSpecification.note: This is a seed/data issue. Portal-fixer can update the seed config or use admin tools.

consolidatedIssues.title: Student not enrolled in Behavioral class — all Behavioral content inaccessible

rootCause.explanation: Behavioral Interview Mastery space (1AqFwKSf59FiIrqzaQ7i) card not visible in /spaces list. Student likely not enrolled in the Behavioral class. Direct URL navigation to story points returns 404.

fixSpecification.action: Enroll test student in Behavioral class
steps: Identify the Behavioral class ID (likely cls_g10_behavioral_a)
Add student entity vmP1QTDZBRCqE3Mr6IPK to the Behavioral class enrollment
Verify: /spaces page should show 'Behavioral Interview Mastery' space card
Verify: /spaces/1AqFwKSf59FiIrqzaQ7i should render with story points visible

consolidatedIssues.title: LLD and Behavioral learner test scripts use wrong URL pattern /story/ instead of /story-points/
affectedTests: All LLD and Behavioral story point tests

rootCause.explanation: The React Router defines story point viewer at /spaces/:spaceId/story-points/:storyPointId (App.tsx line 66). However, both LLD and Behavioral learner test scripts constructed URLs with /story/ instead of /story-points/. This caused all story point pages to hit the app's 404 fallback route. DSA learner correctly used /story-points/. The app's internal navigation links (SpaceViewerPage.tsx:57, StoryPointViewerPage.tsx:86) all correctly use /story-points/.

fixSpecification.action: Fix learner test URL construction to use /story-points/ instead of /story/
steps: In LLD learner test script: replace all /story/ URL segments with /story-points/
In Behavioral learner test script: replace all /story/ URL segments with /story-points/
Alternatively, instead of constructing URLs manually, navigate via the app's UI (click story point links from space viewer page) which generates correct URLs
NOTE: Even with correct URLs, tests will still 404 until EVAL-C2-002 and EVAL-C2-003 (enrollment) are fixed
fixSpecification.note: This is a test script issue. Learner agent team member instructions should be updated to navigate via UI clicks rather than constructing URLs manually.

consolidatedIssues.title: BUG-002 residual: Story Point Viewer h1 timing/visibility issue

rootCause.explanation: StoryPointViewerPage early-returns during loading state (line 148) show skeleton without h1. During itemsHasError state (line 158) shows error message without h1. The h1 at line 248 only renders after data loads successfully. Tests with short timeouts may not see h1 if items load slowly. Additionally, useSpaceItems.ts getDocs() at line 21 has no try-catch — React Query catches the error, but the error state rendering in StoryPointViewerPage doesn't include the story point title h1.

fixSpecification.action: Ensure h1 renders in all states (loading, error, success)
steps: Move the h1 rendering before the isLoading early return, or include it in the loading skeleton
Add h1 to the itemsHasError error state (line 158-170) so story point title is visible even on error
Consider: render breadcrumb + h1 + description before checking isLoading/isError, then show skeleton/error only for the items list below

consolidatedIssues.title: DSA Space Viewer: h1 empty and 0 story point links found

rootCause.explanation: DSA learner report shows space viewer h1 is empty string and 0 story point links found. However, regression tests confirmed L2 (Space Viewer) works. Root cause is likely the SpaceViewerPage hooks bug (EVAL-C2-001) combined with the DSA learner's auth not completing (loginStatus: 'pending'). When unauthenticated, the space viewer may redirect to login or show empty state.

fixSpecification.action: Will be resolved by fixing EVAL-C2-001 (SpaceViewerPage hooks bug)
steps: After EVAL-C2-001 fix, re-test DSA space viewer with proper authentication
Ensure auth state is saved and reused correctly in DSA learner tests

consolidatedIssues.title: Firebase Auth rate limiting blocks System Design learner testing

rootCause.explanation: System Design learner could not login due to Firebase Auth rate limiting. Running multiple concurrent learner agents, each performing fresh logins, triggers Firebase's per-IP rate limit. The regression tester also encountered this during extended test runs.

fixSpecification.action: Implement auth state sharing across test agents
steps: Save auth state (Playwright storageState) after first successful login
Share the auth state file across all learner agents to avoid redundant logins
Add retry logic with exponential backoff for auth failures
Consider: reduce total login attempts by running sequential learner tests after single login
fixSpecification.note: This is a test infrastructure optimization, not an app bug.

steps: In StoryPointViewerPage, render breadcrumbs before the isLoading/isError early returns
This ensures navigation is always visible regardless of data state

portalFixerSpec.description: Prioritized fix sequence for Portal Fixer in Cycle 2

sequence.title: Fix SpaceViewerPage React hooks violation
unblocks: All space viewers for DSA, LLD, Behavioral, System Design
sequence.fix: Move `const [celebrationShown, setCelebrationShown] = useState(false)` from line 103 to before line 63. Also move lines 100-102 (overallPercentage, pointsEarned, totalPoints) above the early returns using optional chaining.

sequence.title: Enroll test student in LLD class
sequence.fix: Add student entity vmP1QTDZBRCqE3Mr6IPK to class cls_g10_lld_a via seed config update or admin tools. Class ID may need lookup in Firestore.

sequence.title: Enroll test student in Behavioral class
sequence.fix: Add student entity vmP1QTDZBRCqE3Mr6IPK to Behavioral Interview class (cls_g10_behavioral_a or similar). Verify class exists in seed results.

sequence.title: Fix learner test URL pattern: /story/ → /story-points/
unblocks: Accurate test results for LLD and Behavioral learners
sequence.fix: Update LLD and Behavioral learner agent instructions to navigate via UI clicks (from space viewer page) instead of constructing URLs manually. If constructing URLs, use /story-points/ not /story/.

sequence.title: Fix Story Point Viewer h1 visibility in all states
sequence.fix: Restructure the return: render breadcrumbs + h1 + description first, then conditionally render loading/error/content for the items list below. This ensures h1 is always visible.

sequence.title: Auth state sharing for test agents
sequence.fix: Save Playwright storageState after first login. Reuse across all learner agents.

sequence.title: Dashboard stat cards always visible
sequence.fix: Show all 4 stat cards with '0' or 'N/A' when data unavailable.

sequence.title: Breadcrumbs visible during loading/error states
sequence.fix: Move breadcrumb rendering before isLoading/isError early returns.

sequence.title: Level badge and XP progress bar
sequence.fix: Implement or unhide level/XP components on DashboardPage.

sequence.title: Theme toggle fix
sequence.fix: Fix theme toggle to toggle 'dark' class on <html>.

readiness.progressSinceCycle1: Significant — 4 bugs fixed, 7 tests newly passing, 0 regressions. But learner testing revealed 3 new P0 access blockers.
criticalPath: 1. Fix SpaceViewerPage hooks bug (EVAL-C2-001) — unblocks all space viewers
2. Enroll student in LLD + Behavioral classes (EVAL-C2-002, EVAL-C2-003) — unblocks 24 story points
3. Fix test URL pattern (EVAL-C2-004) — enables accurate learner testing
4. Fix Story Point Viewer h1 (EVAL-C2-005) — enables content quality testing
readiness.estimatedCycle2Effort: Portal Fixer: ~4 small fixes + 1 medium fix. Content Manager: blocked until access fixed.

cycle3Recommendations: After P0 fixes: re-run all 4 learner agents with correct URLs and enrollments
Implement auth state sharing to prevent Firebase rate limiting
Deep-test all 15 question types (Q1-Q15) once Story Point Viewer fully works
Validate content quality for all 4 spaces (DSA, System Design, LLD, Behavioral)
Test timed assessments end-to-end (need fresh test data — max attempts may be reached)
Address P2/P3 dashboard and UX issues (stat cards, level badge, breadcrumbs, theme toggle)
Run full 91-test audit to establish post-fix baseline
